nasb.text: Now Johanan the son of Kareah and all the commanders of the forces that were in the field came to Gedaliah at Mizpah

esv.text: Now Johanan the son of Kareah and all the leaders of the forces in the open country came to Gedaliah at Mizpah

cnv.text: 加利亞的兒子約哈難和在田野的眾將領，都到米斯巴去見基大利，

ccb.text: 加利亚的儿子约哈难和在乡村的众将领来到米斯巴见基大利，
